meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Nintendo Switch repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Nintendo Switch Repair Winnipeg | Joy-Con Drift Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Nintendo Switch repair in Winnipeg. Joy-Con drift, screen, battery, charging port repair for Switch OLED, Switch Lite & original Switch.
page.h1: Nintendo Switch Repair Experts in Winnipeg
page.heroDescription: Joy-Con drift driving you crazy? Screen cracked? We fix all Nintendo Switch models in Winnipeg—OLED, original, and Lite.

heroImage.alt: Nintendo Switch repair services in Winnipeg

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Replace cracked LCD or OLED screens on all Switch models.

services.name: Joy-Con Drift Repair
services.description: Permanent fix for analog stick drift on Joy-Con controllers.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore battery life for longer portable gaming sessions.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: Fix USB-C charging port and dock connection issues.

services.name: Speaker Repair
services.description: Repair built-in speakers and audio issues.

services.name: WiFi/Bluetooth Repair
services.description: Fix wireless connectivity for online play.

advantage_pillars.title: Switch Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Winnipeg's Nintendo Switch and Joy-Con repair experts.

advantage_pillars.title: Joy-Con Drift Experts
advantage_pillars.description: Permanent analog stick fixes—our most common Switch repair.

advantage_pillars.title: Same-Day Service
advantage_pillars.description: Most Joy-Con repairs completed in under an hour.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

models_description: We repair all Nintendo Switch models including OLED, original, and Lite, plus Joy-Con and Pro controllers.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Nintendo Switch repair costs depend on the issue. Nintendo's official consumer support outlines warranty coverage.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Joy-Con repairs are very affordable, but OLED screen replacements can approach a significant portion of the console's value. iFixit's Joy-Con teardowns show why drift is so common.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost doesn't make sense, we'll explain alternatives including trade-in options.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: Your game saves are typically backed up to Nintendo Switch Online.

faqs.question: Can you fix Joy-Con drift in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! Joy-Con drift is our most common Switch repair. Usually completed within an hour.

faqs.question: Do you repair Switch OLED screens?
faqs.answer: Yes, we replace both LCD and OLED screens.

faqs.question: Can you fix a Switch that won't charge?
faqs.answer: Yes, we diagnose and repair charging issues including USB-C port replacement.

faqs.question: Do you repair the Switch dock?
faqs.answer: Yes, we repair common dock issues.

faqs.question: How long does Joy-Con repair take?
faqs.answer: Joy-Con drift repair typically takes 30-60 minutes.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
